study_purpose.value: Learn more about the safety of the study drug and how well it works.
study_purpose.evidence: The purpose of this study is to learn more about the safety of the study drug and how well it works.

duration.evidence: Attend clinic visits over approximately 24 weeks

procedures.evidence: Attend clinic visits over approximately 24 weeks
Provide blood samples at multiple visits
Complete questionnaires about symptoms and quality of life
Undergo imaging scans as part of routine assessment (if applicable)

risks.value: Bruising, pain, or infection from blood draws
risks.evidence: Bruising, pain, or infection from blood draws
Side effects from study medication, which may be mild or serious

risks.value: Privacy risks if data not handled securely
risks.evidence: Loss of privacy if your data is not handled securely

withdrawal_rights.value: Participation is voluntary and you can withdraw at any time without penalty.
withdrawal_rights.evidence: Your participation is voluntary. You can withdraw at any time without penalty...

confidentiality_summary.value: Study records kept confidential as allowed by law; data may be reviewed by regulators and ethics committees.
confidentiality_summary.evidence: Your study records will be kept confidential... may be shared with regulators and ethics committees

data_sharing.value: Data may be shared with regulators and ethics committees for review.
data_sharing.evidence: Your data may be shared with regulators and ethics committees for review.

teach_back_questions.value: In your own words, what is the purpose of this study?
What are the main risks of taking part?
What should you do if you decide you no longer want to take part?
Who may review your data and why?

governance_flags: Human review required for any medication side effect explanation beyond what the consent states.
Ensure privacy statement aligns with local data protection requirements.
Imaging procedures should be confirmed in full consent and site workflow.

human_review_required.reason: Version date not present in excerpt; must be pulled from full ICF.
Imaging is conditional ('if applicable'); confirm modality and schedule in full ICF.

audit_trail.extraction_method: LLM structured extraction using prompt template (see prompt.md)
audit_trail.data_handling_note: No patient-level data used; contact details redacted if present; human validation required for flagged fields.
